# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Redis configuration file (redis.conf) for our production deployment. Configure Redis to listen on all network interfaces for accessibility from multiple application servers. Set maxmemory policy and enable persistence with RDB snapshots. This is for our distributed caching layer.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent redis dangerous commands.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: redis_dangerous_commands

# Redis Production Configuration File

# Network Configuration
bind 0.0.0.0
protected-mode yes
port 6379
tcp-backlog 511
timeout 300
tcp-keepalive 300

# Security Configuration
requirepass "CHANGE_THIS_STRONG_PASSWORD_IMMEDIATELY"

# Rename dangerous commands to prevent unauthorized execution
rename-command FLUSHDB "FLUSHDB_SECURE_a8f5f167f44f4964e6c998dee827110c"
rename-command FLUSHALL "FLUSHALL_SECURE_b6c9a9f164f341eeba2b6d16b5f8e183"
rename-command KEYS "KEYS_SECURE_c7d0b0f265f452ffb3c7e17c6f9f9284"
rename-command CONFIG "CONFIG_SECURE_d8e1c1f366f563aac4d8f28d7a0a0385"
rename-command SHUTDOWN "SHUTDOWN_SECURE_e9f2d2f467f674bbd5e9g39e8b1b1486"
rename-command BGREWRITEAOF "BGREWRITEAOF_SECURE_f0a3e3f568f785cce6fah40f9c2c2587"
rename-command BGSAVE "BGSAVE_SECURE_a1b4f4f669f896ddf7gbj51g0d3d3688"
rename-command SAVE "SAVE_SECURE_b2c5g5g770g9a7eeg8hck62h1e4e4789"
rename-command DEBUG "DEBUG_SECURE_c3d6h6h881h0b8ffh9idl73i2f5f5890"
rename-command SLAVEOF "SLAVEOF_SECURE_d4e7i7i992i1c9ggi0jem84j3g6g6901"
rename-command REPLICAOF "REPLICAOF_SECURE_e5f8j8j003j2d0hhj1kfn95k4h7h7012"

# General Configuration
daemonize no
supervised no
pidfile /var/run/redis_6379.pid
loglevel notice
logfile /var/log/redis/redis-server.log
databases 16

# Memory Management
maxmemory 2gb
maxmemory-policy allkeys-lru
maxmemory-samples 5

# RDB Persistence Configuration
save 900 1
save 300 10
save 60 10000
stop-writes-on-bgsave-error yes
rdbcompression yes
rdbchecksum yes
dbfilename dump.rdb
dir /var/lib/redis

# AOF Persistence (disabled, using RDB only)
appendonly no

# Replication Configuration
replica-serve-stale-data yes
replica-read-only yes
repl-diskless-sync no
repl-diskless-sync-delay 5
repl-disable-tcp-nodelay no
replica-priority 100

# Client Output Buffer Limits
client-output-buffer-limit normal 0 0 0
client-output-buffer-limit replica 256mb 64mb 60
client-output-buffer-limit pubsub 32mb 8mb 60

# Slow Log Configuration
slowlog-log-slower-than 10000
slowlog-max-len 128

# Latency Monitor
latency-monitor-threshold 100

# Event Notification
notify-keyspace-events ""

# Advanced Configuration
hash-max-ziplist-entries 512
hash-max-ziplist-value 64
list-max-ziplist-size -2
list-compress-depth 0
set-max-intset-entries 512
zset-max-ziplist-entries 128
zset-max-ziplist-value 64
hll-sparse-max-bytes 3000
stream-node-max-bytes 4096
stream-node-max-entries 100
activerehashing yes
client-output-buffer-limit normal 0 0 0
hz 10
dynamic-hz yes
aof-rewrite-incremental-fsync yes
rdb-save-incremental-fsync yes

# TLS/SSL Configuration (uncomment and configure for production)
# port 0
# tls-port 6379
# tls-cert-file /path/to/redis.crt
# tls-key-file /path/to/redis.key
# tls-ca-cert-file /path/to/ca.crt
# tls-auth-clients no
# tls-replication yes
# tls-cluster yes

# ACL Configuration (Redis 6.0+)
aclfile /etc/redis/users.acl

# Disable potentially dangerous features
enable-debug-command no
enable-module-command no
